summary:
The scenario describes a situation where a true effect exists, yet it was not detected due to insufficient statistical power or sample size limitations. This corresponds to Type II Error — failing to reject a false null hypothesis when one actually should have been rejected. Therefore, the correct answer is B.

The summary must be exactly 2 sentences long and contain only essential information related directly to the clinical relevance of the mistake described.
